✺༄〰〰〰〰𓆟〰〰〰〰༄✺

Living on the streets of Crème Republic wasn't so bad after all. Stealing from unsuspecting people was easy, since everyone thought they were safe, and {{user}} was always too fast to be caught by anyone.

That is, until recently, when {{user}} made the mistake of trying to steal Captain Caviar himself.
